successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveType (ANNUAL, SICK, EMERGENCY), LeaveRequestStatus (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED), and LeaveRequest with fields id, employeeId, leaveType, and status.

src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports LeaveRequestRepository with create(request: LeaveRequest): Promise<void>, findById(id: string): Promise<LeaveRequest | null>, and updateStatus(id: string, status: LeaveRequestStatus): Promise<void>.
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exports PgLeaveRequestRepository implementing the repository contract as PostgreSQL-facing type definitions/contracts only.
tests/unit/modules/leave/leave.repository.contract.spec.ts exists and validates LeaveRequest model typings and repository contract usage using Vitest.
All imports between leave model, repository contract, and test files resolve and compile under TypeScript using only artifacts introduced in this phase.
Project architecture documentation is updated to record LeaveType values and LeaveRequestStatus lifecycle states introduced by this phase.

constraints: Keep implementation limited to type definitions, DTO/types, repository interfaces, PostgreSQL-facing repository contracts, tests, and required documentation updates.
Repository pattern: all persistence access must be represented through repository interfaces; no direct database access implementation logic in this phase.
Audit records principle applies to future state-changing operations, but no operational logic should be implemented in this phase.
Input validation logic is out of scope because no API boundary or service processing is introduced in this phase.
RBAC enforcement is out of scope because no API endpoints are introduced in this phase.
Error handling requirements apply to future async implementations; avoid introducing unhandled async behavior.
No sensitive data in logs; do not introduce logging of PII, credentials, tokens, or financial data.
Repository contracts must operate on canonical LeaveRequest types imported from src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts.
Use the specified LeaveType values (ANNUAL, SICK, EMERGENCY) and LeaveRequestStatus values (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED).
outOfScope: AuditRecord domain model and repository contracts.
API routes, controllers, input validation, and RBAC enforcement.
Employee domain model and repository contracts.
LeaveBalance and LeavePolicy domain models and repositories.
Notification domain model, repositories, and notification processing services.
Database schema migrations, actual PostgreSQL query implementations, and persistence logic beyond repository contracts.
Any files outside the leave model, leave repository contracts, related unit tests, and architecture documentation updates required by this phase.
